NORRIV HOLOGRAM BOX
Explore a new dimension of visual engagement with norriv Hologram Box® A groundbreaking fusion of technology and imagination – where holograms come to life with the power of artificial intelligence. Discover our technology that transcends reality, bringing your wildest dreams and visions into vivid, three-dimensional existence.

Our References
CLIENTS
Stories of our clients that have taken advantage of holograms at the events, trade shows, conferences and boosted their customer interaction in shopping malls, museums, medical centers and many more.
Dana Kováčová
Raiffeisenbank
Employer Brand Manager
I would like to thank norriv for truly excellent and efficient collaboration. In a very short time (approximately 6 weeks), they managed to create a wonderful custom piece that attracted hundreds of students. Precisely tuned graphics, added effects beyond our expectations, and a very pleasant surprise... Everything was done on time and with great willingness to fulfill our expectations and needs as much as possible. This was despite norriv dealing with many other projects at the time. Thank you for that, and we highly recommend them to others. :)
Kamila Rychtarikova
Hilton Prague Hotel
Event Manager
I can only share positive feedback and recommend norriv team as it is very out-going, flexible and cooperative startup business. The gentlemen from norriv went above and beyond to find the best solution to our Cloud 9 Sky Bar & Lounge, helped us to select the most suitable devices, set innovative animations and provided us with very complex training on how to program our own content on holograms. The cooperation we had was great in all the aspects.
Peter B.
Siemens
Brand Manager
Perfect, flexible cooperation, flawless execution.
Lukas Busa
TESLA Group
Marketing Manager

ABOUT NORRIV
WE STRIVE TO VISUALIZE YOUR IDEAS
At norriv, we're passionate tech enthusiasts and geeks dedicated to visualizing your ideas. Our client-centric approach ensures tailored solutions, while our commitment to quality remains unwavering. We bridge the worlds of Artificial Intelligence and holograms, pioneering innovative experiences.
OUR BENEFITS
WHY US?
We are driven by our commitment to innovation and sustainability redefining how we connect and work in a dynamic world.
SUSTAINABILITY
We are committed to operating with transparency, honesty, and integrity in all aspects of our business.
VISION
Our vision drives us to pioneer the future of communication, where holographic avatars play a central role in connecting people across the globe.
INTEGRITY
We operate with transparency, honesty, and integrity in all aspects of our business.
EFFICIENCY
Our holographic avatars streamline communication processes, saving time and resources for our clients and users.
PROFESSIONALISM
We deliver holographic solutions that meet the highest standards of quality and excellence.
INNOVATION
We continuously push the boundaries of technology and creativity to deliver groundbreaking solutions that inspire and captivate audiences.
OUR TEAM
TEAM norriv
Our team comprises seasoned professionals from diverse backgrounds with years of experience. We're technocrats and a fearless bunch of entrepreneurs who thrive on challenges and embrace the unknown. We bridge the worlds of Artificial Intelligence and holograms, pioneering innovative experiences.

AI HOLOGRAPHIC ASSISTANT
AI Holographic Assistant combines the power of artificial intelligence with the immersive experience of holographic projection. A three-dimensional, lifelike humanoid assistant, ready to assist you at a moment's notice. Whether you prefer voice commands, gestures, or touch interactions, communicating with your assistant feels natural and intuitive.
